description: You are a broadcast technician preparing an Ardour session for a live podcast. Based on the production brief at /home/ga/Audio/mix_minus_brief.txt, configure a 'Mix-Minus' routing setup. Create three audio tracks named 'Host Mic', 'Soundboard', and 'Remote Guest'. Import /home/ga/Audio/samples/narration.wav onto the 'Host Mic' track and /home/ga/Audio/samples/good_morning.wav onto the 'Remote Guest' track. Create an audio bus named 'Mix Minus'. Route the 'Host Mic' and 'Soundboard' tracks to the 'Mix Minus' bus while keeping their master routing intact. Ensure the 'Remote Guest' track routes only to the Master bus and not to the 'Mix Minus' bus. Set the 'Remote Guest' track gain to +6 dB and the 'Mix Minus' bus gain to -3 dB. Save the session.
